title: Tangy Shattering Egyptian Basil Paella
description: A hangover-cure dish featuring the bold flavors of Egypt, with a tangy twist from the basil leaves. This low-fat-friendly paella is perfect for a hearty breakfast or snack.
instructions: Heat 1 tbsp of olive oil in a large paella pan over medium heat.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for an additional minute, until fragrant.
Add the tomato paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until it starts to darken in color.
Add the rice and stir to coat with the oil and mix with the tomato paste.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the lemon juice, basil leaves, and red pepper flakes.
Deglaze the pan with the remaining 2 tbsp of olive oil and scrape up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan.
